text:
py.test is a simple and popular testing tool for Python.

WWW:   http://pytest.org/



This port should be commited AFTER ports/158939!

py.test was a part of pylib (devel/py-pylib) before, then it was moved into own project.

tinderbuild log (8.2-RELEASE):
http://happy-nation.by.ru/ports/tb/py27-pytest-2.1.0.log
